dict.string: CoriyonsList needs your location to show you marketplace listings, deals, and buyers in your immediate neighborhood.
CoriyonsList needs your location to show you marketplace listings, deals, and buyers in your immediate neighborhood.
CoriyonsList requires access to your photos so you can seamlessly upload images for your marketplace listings and profile avatar.
CoriyonsList requires camera access so you can take and upload photos of your items directly to your marketplace listings.
